titleStmt.title: SII 38.429: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 429. (A.R. No. 429 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north verandah, first prākāra, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakravarttigaḷ Vīrarājēndra (Kulōttuṅga III) Year 5: 1183 A.D.

summary.p: Commences with the meykīrtti of the ruler, Puyal-vāyttu.

It records that Uḍaiyān Ekavāśakaṉulagu kaṇviḍitta perumāḷ alias Vaṇakōvaraiyar of Tuṇḍa-nāḍu in Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu had constructed the shrine for the goddess, in stone, in the north-western corner of the north verandah of Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiyār temple at Vaḻukūr, a brahmadēyam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷavaḷanāḍu. He also donated kāśu for plastering the shrine. The record further states that in the 143th day of the 8th regnal year (of the king), the same person donated two thousand kāśu and the interest accured at the rate of one-eighth kāśu per annum, should be utilized for meeting the daily expenses of the worship of the goddess. However, the amount was used for purchasing land (for the same purpose) and this transaction was to be engraved on stone by the temple officials, mahēśvarakkaṇkāṇi, dēvakaṉmi and koyiṟkaṇakkaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ puyalvāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉ maṟaiyin
ceyal vāykkat tirumakaḷuñceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇma poṟ ku
ṭai viḷaṅkavel ventaraṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉunitit
taḻait toṅka cakkaramuñceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñcela naṭāttak kaṟpakālam pu
vi perukaṭal poṟpamainta puvipuṉaintu cempon virasiṁhāsanattu puvaṉamu
ḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkarava
ttikaḷ śrī virarājentiradevaṟkki yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr
ttiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaḻukūruṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār koyilil va
ṭakkiṟ ttirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil vaṭamelaimulaiyil tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai Āḷuṭaiya
nācciyār Eḻuntaruḷiirukka ttiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiyāka kallāl tirukkaṟṟaḷittirup
paṇiyāka ten vaṭal Iraṇṭu pattiyum kiḻmel Aiñcu pattiyum kāl nāṭṭi
munṟu pāśvamuñ cuvarākac ceytu pāvittaṭeṭāṭiṭṭucRead taṭṭoṭiṭṭucāntiṭavum veṇṭuṅkā
cu kuṭuttut tiruppaṇi ceyvittār muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭut tuṇṭaṉāṭṭu
ttuṇṭaṉāṭuṭaiyāṉ Ekavācakaṉ Ulakukaṇviṭutta perumāḷāṉa vāṇa
kovaraiyar .§ Iṉṉācciyāṟkuttiruppaṭimāṟṟukku nilaṅkoṇṭu vi
ṭṭu Ivvāṇakovaraiyar varakkāṭṭi Eṭṭāvatu ḷ 100 4 10 3ṉāl koyilil Oṭu
kkiṉa kācu 2 1000 Ikkācuiraṇṭāyirattukkum nilaṅkoṇṭu kalluveṭṭumaḷavu
m Ivvāṭṭaik kārttikaimāsa mutal kācukku tiṅkaḷ Araimāvaraikkāṇi
policaiyāka vanta kācu nācciyāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkuṭalākac cel
vatākavum Ikkācukku nilaṅkoṇṭavāṟe policai tavira nilaṅkoṇṭa
piramāṇappaṭiye kalveṭṭivikkak kaṭavomāṉom Ikkoyiliṟ cimā[he]
śvarakkaṇkāṇiceyvāṉum tevakanmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṉum Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 38.429 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
